title: Egg Hunt
description: A simple server-side easter egg hunt mod for Fabric.
body:
# Egg Hunt
Egg Hunt is a simple and fun way to introduce a festive Easter egg hunt to your Fabric server. Players can find eggs placed all around the world, with easily customizable textures and rewards.

## Resources
* Check out the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/egghunt/gallery) to get an impression of what this mod looks like in-game.
* See also the repository's [README](https://github.com/kr8gz/EggHunt/blob/master/README.md) for more information!

## Important Notes
* The mod will prevent eggs from being broken by any means other than a player with sufficient permission breaking them, such as using water or TNT. This might cause client desynchronization issues, which can however be fixed by simply relogging.
* Also consider adding a permissions mod like [LuckPerms](https://luckperms.net) to your server to gain more precise control over permissions.

Please [create an issue](https://github.com/kr8gz/EggHunt/issues/new) if you encounter any problems!
